title: REORGANIZE behavior is not consistent with mysql
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)
```
CREATE TABLE sales_partitioned (
    sale_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT,
    region VARCHAR(50),
    amount DECIMAL(10,2),
    sale_date DATE DEFAULT '2023-01-01',
    PRIMARY KEY (sale_id, sale_date)
) PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS(sale_date) (
    PARTITION p2022 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-01-01'),
    PARTITION p2023 VALUES LESS THAN ('2024-01-01')
);

 ALTER TABLE sales_partitioned REORGANIZE PARTITION p2023 INTO (
    PARTITION p2023q1 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-04-01'),
    PARTITION p2023q2 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-07-01')
);
```
### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

Results from mysql:
```
MySQL [test2]>  ALTER TABLE sales_partitioned REORGANIZE PARTITION p2023 INTO (
    ->     PARTITION p2023q1 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-04-01'),
    ->     PARTITION p2023q2 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-07-01')
    -> );
ERROR 1520 (HY000): Reorganize of range partitions cannot change total ranges except for last partition where it can extend the range
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)
results from tidb:
```
MySQL [test1]>  ALTER TABLE sales_partitioned REORGANIZE PARTITION p2023 INTO (
    ->     PARTITION p2023q1 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-04-01'),
    ->     PARTITION p2023q2 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-07-01')
    -> );
Query OK, 0 rows affected, 1 warning (1.67 sec)
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)
```
MySQL [test1]> select tidb_version();
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v7.5.6
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 1ad553d6de2cb0c9b2f3cfdb760aaae109b2c466
Git Branch: HEAD
UTC Build Time: 2025-03-12 10:49:51
GoVersion: go1.21.13
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: tikv |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.01 sec)
```
poc: ALTER TABLE sales_partitioned REORGANIZE PARTITION p2023 INTO (
key_bug_features: REORGANIZE PARTITION behavior inconsistent with MySQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE sales_partitioned_v2 (sale_id INT AUTO_INCREMENT, region VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, amount DECIMAL(10,2) CHECK (amount >= 0), sale_date DATE DEFAULT CURRENT_DATE, PRIMARY KEY (sale_id, sale_date)) PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS(sale_date) (PARTITION p2022 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-01-01'), PARTITION p2023 VALUES LESS THAN ('2024-01-01'));
INSERT INTO sales_partitioned_v2 (region, amount, sale_date) VALUES ('North', 150.00, '2023-02-15');
ALTER TABLE sales_partitioned_v2 REORGANIZE PARTITION p2023 INTO (PARTITION p2023q1 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-04-01'), PARTITION p2023q2 VALUES LESS THAN ('2023-07-01'));
SELECT sale_id, region, amount FROM sales_partitioned_v2 WHERE sale_date IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE sales_partitioned_v2 SET amount = amount + 50 WHERE region = 'North' AND sale_date < '2023-03-01';
